chunks.text: J, ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-6228 of 2024 Date Order with Signature (s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainabilitv of this petition 07.04.2025 None present None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation is received. Same was position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed on account of non-prosecution along with pending applications. J E JUDGE Rafiq/P.A ( ! I
